title: Level 6: The Multi-Layer Insider Attack
briefing: A client dataset was exported from a secure analytics platform. The attacker used misleading logs, shared credentials, and staged evidence to blame another employee.
solutionExplanation: Kabir used an old service token, staged access from Priyanka's desk, exported the dataset through a background job, and planted misleading evidence in the audit trail.

suspects.name: Kabir Malhotra
suspects.description: Had deep knowledge of service tokens, background jobs, and audit logging.

suspects.name: Priyanka Iyer
suspects.description: Owned the client dashboard and was initially blamed due to workstation activity.

suspects.name: Sameer Patil
suspects.description: Managed database backups and access policies.

suspects.name: Aditi Rao
suspects.description: Reviewed audit logs and data access requests.

suspects.name: Neeraj Sen
suspects.description: Maintained deployment pipelines and server monitoring.

evidence.title: Primary Audit Log
evidence.content: The client dataset export was initiated at 11:42 PM from Priyanka Iyer's workstation ID. The audit log labels the export as manual_dashboard_export.

evidence.title: Workstation Presence Report
evidence.content: Priyanka Iyer's workstation was unlocked between 11:35 PM and 11:50 PM. However, Priyanka's building access card shows she exited the office at 9:05 PM and did not re-enter.

evidence.title: Background Job Queue Log
evidence.content: The dataset export was actually executed by background job export_worker_17 at 11:42 PM. The job was triggered using service token svc_legacy_reports.

evidence.title: Service Token Ownership Record
evidence.content: The legacy token svc_legacy_reports was created by Kabir Malhotra six months earlier for a reporting migration. The token should have been retired but was still active.

evidence.title: Token Access History
evidence.content: The token svc_legacy_reports was unused for 82 days before the incident. It was tested twice from Kabir Malhotra's development machine at 10:58 PM and 11:06 PM on the same night.

evidence.title: Misleading Audit Label Note
evidence.content: The label manual_dashboard_export was injected into the audit metadata by the background job. Normal dashboard exports do not use export_worker_17.

evidence.title: Witness Statement - Kabir Malhotra
evidence.content: Kabir says he was reviewing old migration scripts from home but did not access any production token. He says the audit clearly points to Priyanka's workstation.

evidence.title: VPN Connection Log
evidence.content: Kabir Malhotra connected to the company VPN from 10:50 PM to 11:55 PM. During this time, his development machine accessed internal service documentation and token validation endpoints.

evidence.title: Database Export Record
evidence.content: The exported dataset contained 48,000 client records. Sameer Patil's DBA account did not perform any direct export, backup, or dump during the incident window.

evidence.title: Compliance Review Note
evidence.content: Aditi Rao found that the export request did not have an approved compliance ticket. The export path bypassed the normal dashboard approval workflow.

evidence.title: DevOps Monitoring Alert
evidence.content: Neeraj Sen received an alert at 11:43 PM for unusual outbound data transfer. His DevOps account acknowledged the alert at 11:46 PM but did not trigger the export.

evidence.title: Workstation Remote Access Note
evidence.content: Priyanka's workstation received a remote unlock command at 11:36 PM. The command originated from an internal admin utility previously maintained by Kabir Malhotra.

evidence.title: Internal Admin Utility Documentation
evidence.content: The internal admin utility can remotely unlock a workstation for maintenance if paired with a service token. Kabir Malhotra was the original maintainer of this utility.

evidence.title: Incident Timeline
evidence.content: 9:05 PM: Priyanka exited office. 10:50 PM: Kabir connected to VPN. 10:58 PM: Legacy token tested from Kabir's machine. 11:06 PM: Legacy token tested again. 11:36 PM: Priyanka's workstation remotely unlocked. 11:42 PM: export_worker_17 exported client dataset using legacy token. 11:43 PM: outbound data alert triggered. 11:55 PM: Kabir disconnected from VPN.
